highlights: Jade-colored water in sheltered bay setting, especially stunning during calm weather periods
Central Phan Rang location with convenient access and nearby resorts and mountain views
White sand beach with coconut trees, freshwater showers, and parking facilities available

thingsToKnow.crowds: Morning is quieter; evenings become crowded and windy. Less crowded than Vung Tau or Nha Trang
thingsToKnow.difficulty: Strong waves suitable for surfing rather than swimming; challenging for children and elderly
thingsToKnow.accessibility: Easy access from town center; parking available (5,000-10,000 VND); freshwater showers provided; limited shade from trees
thingsToKnow.seasonal: Windy season affects swimming comfort; best during calm weather periods. Winter months may have strong winds

visitorTips: Visit early morning for calm conditions and fewer crowds; avoid evenings when windy and crowded
Bring own food or eat elsewhere; avoid overpriced beachside restaurants with mediocre quality
Parking organized by locals without clear pricing; negotiate rates beforehand (typically 5,000-10,000 VND)

faq.question: When is the best time to swim at this beach?
faq.answer: Early morning offers quieter conditions and calmer water. Avoid evenings when strong winds make swimming uncomfortable

faq.question: What are the swimming conditions like?
faq.answer: Strong waves make it better for surfing than swimming. Challenging for children and elderly due to wave strength

faq.question: What facilities are available?
faq.answer: Parking (5,000-10,000 VND), freshwater showers, and drinks vendors. Coconut trees provide some shade; limited food options

sentiment.positive: Travelers appreciate jade-green water, central location, cleanliness improvements, friendly locals, scenic mountain views, and suitability for those avoiding crowded beaches
sentiment.negative: Recurring complaints about beach cleanliness from food waste, overpriced and poor-quality beachside restaurants, unclear parking pricing, and strong winds affecting swimming during certain periods
